name: Emerald Interior Acrylic Latex
description: Sherwin-Williams' flagship interior paint with outstanding washability, hide, and colour accuracy. Features Color Lock technology to resist colour rub-off and Formaldehyde-reducing technology for improved indoor air quality. Industry benchmark for premium residential and commercial interiors.

name: Duration Home Interior Acrylic Latex
description: Premium moisture and mildew resistant interior latex with exceptional durability for high-traffic areas. Zero VOC formula with a hard, scrubbable finish suitable for kitchens, bathrooms, and family rooms. Advanced PermaPore technology resists stains and moisture penetration.

name: Harmony Interior Acrylic Latex
description: Zero VOC interior paint that actively reduces indoor formaldehyde levels and is certified Asthma & Allergy Friendly by the Asthma and Allergy Foundation of America. Ideal for schools, hospitals, homes with allergy sufferers, and LEED-certified projects. Excellent hide and washability.

name: SuperPaint Interior Acrylic Latex
description: Mid-premium contractor workhorse offering excellent hide, durability, and washability for residential and commercial interiors. Low VOC formula with broad sheen selection and reliable application properties across a wide temperature range. A trusted professional specification.

name: Cashmere Interior Acrylic Latex
description: Premium interior latex delivering a luxurious, velvety smooth finish with outstanding coverage and colour depth. Three-sheen system (Low Sheen, Medium Lustre, High Gloss) provides sophisticated results for feature walls and high-end residential work. Excellent flow and levelling.

name: ProMar 200 Zero VOC Interior Latex
description: Professional-grade contractor interior latex with zero VOC for new construction and repaint markets. Excellent hide, coverage, and workability at a competitive price point. Available in a full range of sheens and tintable to any SW colour. The contractor standard for commercial projects.

name: ProMar 400 Interior Latex
description: Economy contractor interior latex for production painting and new construction. Good hiding power and workability at the most competitive price point in the SW contractor lineup. Suitable for walls and ceilings in residential new construction and basic commercial repaint work.

name: ProMar 700 Interior Latex
description: Entry-level economy interior latex for budget-conscious production and new construction painting. Reliable hiding and workability for walls and ceilings where premium performance is not required. Often specified for builder-grade apartments and multi-unit residential.

name: ProMar Ceiling Flat White
description: Ultra-flat zero-VOC ceiling paint formulated to minimise spray spatter and produce a smooth, non-reflective finish. Excellent hide in one coat on properly primed surfaces. The professional standard for commercial ceiling applications where touch-up uniformity matters.

name: Emerald Exterior Acrylic Latex
description: SW's premium exterior paint with Color Lock technology for outstanding fade and UV resistance. Self-priming formula fills cracks up to 3 mm and delivers excellent adhesion to all properly prepared exterior surfaces. Backed by a lifetime guarantee on colour and sheen retention.

name: Emerald Rain-Refresh Exterior Acrylic Latex
description: Premium exterior latex with hydrophobic technology that resists wash-off if it rains within 60 minutes of application. Ideal for spring and fall painting when weather is unpredictable. Delivers the same premium colour retention and durability as the standard Emerald Exterior.

name: Duration Exterior Acrylic Coating
description: Professional-grade exterior coating with PermaPore technology that allows the film to breathe while blocking water intrusion. Self-priming and crack-bridging with a thick, flexible film. Backed by a lifetime guarantee for years of protection on wood, hardboard, and cementitious substrates.

name: SuperPaint Exterior Acrylic Latex
description: Mid-premium 100% acrylic exterior latex with Resinex technology for exceptional adhesion, fade resistance, and flexibility. Reliable workhorse for contractor repaint and new construction exterior work. Good application properties across a wide range of temperatures and humidity levels.

name: A-100 Exterior Latex Paint
description: Reliable mid-tier 100% acrylic exterior latex offering good hide, adhesion, and weather resistance at a competitive price. Popular with production painters for residential repaint and new construction work. Good application properties in a full range of colours.

name: Resilience Exterior Acrylic Latex
description: Exterior latex with proprietary moisture cure technology that allows it to be applied in temperatures as low as 2°C (35°F) and will cure even in damp conditions. Excellent choice for early spring or late fall painting projects in the Canadian climate. Good fade and mildew resistance.

name: ProMar 200 Exterior Latex
description: Professional contractor exterior latex at an economy price point with good hide, adhesion, and weather resistance. Suitable for contractor production exterior painting of residential siding and trim. Available in a limited sheen and colour selection.

name: Exterior Oil Based Paint
description: Traditional alkyd oil-based exterior paint delivering a hard, durable film with excellent levelling and gloss retention. Suitable for metal doors, wood trim, and iron railings where an oil-based product is preferred. Requires mineral spirits cleanup and longer dry time but offers superior penetration.

name: Emerald Urethane Trim Enamel
description: Waterborne urethane alkyd enamel that delivers a factory-like hard finish on doors, trim, and cabinets. Excellent blocking of tannin bleed from wood and outstanding chip and mar resistance. Self-levelling formula minimises brush marks and provides a smooth, professional result in multiple recoats.

name: All Surface Enamel
description: Versatile interior/exterior latex enamel for doors, trim, shutters, and furniture with good hardness and block resistance. Suitable for both interior and exterior applications where a durable enamel finish is needed. Low VOC and water cleanup.

name: Pro Industrial Waterborne Alkyd
description: High-performance waterborne alkyd enamel delivering the hard, durable finish of oil-based alkyds with the convenience of water cleanup. Excellent for production cabinet and millwork finishing. Superior block resistance, good flow, and levelling properties for professional shop and field application.

name: PrepRite ProBlock Interior/Exterior Latex Primer
description: Stain-blocking latex primer sealer that stops water stains, smoke, tannin bleed, and other common interior and exterior stains. Low VOC formula with good adhesion to previously painted surfaces and bare drywall. Suitable for interior/exterior use under any latex or alkyd topcoat.

name: PrepRite Classic Interior Latex Primer
description: General purpose drywall primer sealer for new and existing drywall surfaces. Seals pores and provides a uniform base for topcoats, reducing paint consumption and improving hide. Low VOC and fast drying for efficient production work on new construction and repaint projects.

name: Premium Wall & Wood Interior Latex Primer
description: High-build interior primer sealer for walls, ceilings, and wood substrates that fills minor surface imperfections and sands easily. Excellent for preparing older surfaces with minor texture variation. Provides a uniform, sealed surface that reduces topcoat consumption and enhances overall appearance.

name: Exterior Latex Primer
description: 100% acrylic exterior primer for new and previously painted wood, hardboard, and masonry surfaces. Excellent penetration into bare wood and strong adhesion for topcoats. Low VOC formula suitable under any exterior acrylic or latex topcoat system.

name: Exterior Oil Based Primer
description: Traditional alkyd oil-based exterior primer delivering deep penetration into bare wood and superior adhesion for topcoats. Recommended for weathered, chalky, or difficult-to-prime substrates where maximum adhesion is required. Compatible with alkyd and latex topcoats after full cure.

name: Multi-Purpose Latex Primer
description: Versatile interior and exterior multi-surface primer for drywall, wood, masonry, and previously painted surfaces. Good stain blocking and adhesion properties suitable for a wide range of topcoats and substrates. Economical choice for new construction priming across multiple surface types.

name: Loxon Concrete & Masonry Primer
description: Alkali-resistant 100% acrylic primer for concrete, block, brick, and stucco surfaces. Seals the porous alkaline surface and provides a strong bond for latex or elastomeric topcoats. Penetrates deeply into masonry and tolerates moisture vapour emission for long-term adhesion.

name: Loxon Deep Penetrating Primer
description: Penetrating sealer/primer for chalky, weathered, or porous concrete and masonry surfaces. Low-viscosity formula penetrates deep into the substrate to consolidate weak surfaces and provide a strong foundation for finish coat systems. Can be used on both vertical and horizontal concrete.

name: Extreme Bond Primer
description: Aggressive adhesion primer that bonds to slick and difficult surfaces including glass, tile, metal, PVC, and highly glossy paint without sanding. Low VOC waterborne formula ideal for renovation projects where mechanical abrasion is not practical. Topcoat with any latex or alkyd system.

name: SuperDeck Transparent Penetrating Stain
description: Oil-based penetrating transparent deck and siding stain that protects wood while allowing the natural grain to show through. Deep penetration into wood fibres provides protection from within rather than on the surface. UV inhibitors provide fade resistance and mildew-resistant coating protects the film.

name: SuperDeck Semi-Transparent Stain
description: Oil-based semi-transparent deck and siding stain that provides moderate colour while still showing wood grain texture. Superior penetration and UV protection for decks, fences, and siding. Linseed oil fortified formula nourishes and preserves wood from the inside out.

name: SuperDeck Solid Colour Stain
description: 100% acrylic solid colour exterior stain that hides wood grain while providing excellent adhesion, fade resistance, and flexibility. Does not crack or peel like conventional paint. Recommended for decks, fences, and siding needing full colour coverage with maximum durability.

name: WoodScapes Semi-Transparent Exterior House Stain
description: 100% acrylic waterborne semi-transparent exterior stain that penetrates wood to provide colour and UV protection while allowing grain to show. Low VOC formula dries faster and cleans up with water. Excellent flexibility and adhesion for siding, fences, and exterior wood surfaces.

name: WoodScapes Solid Colour Exterior House Stain
description: 100% acrylic waterborne solid colour exterior stain that provides opaque coverage without the cracking or peeling of conventional paint. Excellent hide, adhesion, and colour retention on siding, fences, and exterior wood. Low VOC with water cleanup.

name: Deck Correct Wood Resurfacer
description: Thick, textured solid-colour coating that fills cracks up to 6 mm and resurffaces weathered or worn deck boards. Provides a non-slip, skid-resistant finish that revives old decks without full replacement. 100% acrylic for long-term durability and fade resistance.

name: Minwax Wood Finish Penetrating Stain
description: The classic oil-based interior penetrating wood stain, available in over 30 colours for enhancing and beautifying all interior wood surfaces. Easy brush or wipe application with excellent penetration into open-grain woods. The industry standard for furniture, cabinetry, and trim finishing.

name: Minwax Gel Stain
description: Oil-based gel formula that stays where you put it without running on vertical surfaces, making it ideal for doors, trim, and difficult-to-stain woods like pine and birch. Provides rich, even colour on wood, metal, and fibreglass. Excellent for staining over existing stain.

name: Loxon Concrete & Masonry Coating
description: 100% acrylic alkali-resistant coating for concrete, block, brick, and stucco surfaces. Provides a durable, breathable film that resists efflorescence and moisture intrusion. Excellent for above-grade masonry walls, retaining walls, and block buildings.

name: Loxon Elastomeric Coating
description: High-build elastomeric coating for concrete block, stucco, and textured masonry surfaces that bridges hairline cracks and resists moisture infiltration. Flexible film accommodates normal substrate movement and maintains waterproofing integrity. Ideal for below-grade exposure and wet climates.

name: H&C Concrete Stain Semi-Transparent
description: Waterborne penetrating semi-transparent concrete stain that colours concrete surfaces while allowing the natural texture to show. UV-stable pigments provide excellent colour retention on exterior concrete driveways, walkways, and patios. Non-film-forming formula will not peel or flake.

name: H&C Concrete Stain Solid Colour
description: 100% acrylic solid colour concrete coating for driveways, walkways, patios, and pool decks. Penetrates and adheres to concrete while providing a durable, colour-rich film. Resists UV fading, peeling, and cracking. Anti-slip additive option available for safety on wet surfaces.

name: Conflex Elastomeric Coating
description: High-build elastomeric coating specifically designed for textured stucco and exterior masonry surfaces. Fills surface imperfections while providing a thick, flexible waterproofing film with excellent crack-bridging capabilities. Suitable for direct application to stucco, EIFS, and concrete.

name: MasonryDefender Penetrating Sealer
description: Clear penetrating silane-siloxane water repellent sealer for concrete, brick, and natural stone that provides invisible protection against water intrusion. Does not change surface appearance and allows vapour transmission. Provides long-term freeze-thaw protection and reduces chloride ingress.

name: DTM Acrylic Coating
description: Waterborne 100% acrylic direct-to-metal coating with built-in corrosion inhibitors for ferrous and non-ferrous metal surfaces. Excellent adhesion without sandblasting on hand-cleaned or power tool cleaned steel. Suitable for structural steel, equipment, and galvanized metal.

name: DTM Alkyd Coating
description: Alkyd direct-to-metal enamel for ferrous metal surfaces requiring a traditional oil-based finish. Excellent gloss and colour retention with good rust-inhibitive properties for structural steel, machinery, and equipment in mild to moderate corrosion environments.

name: Kem Kromik Universal Metal Primer
description: Time-tested alkyd rust-inhibitive primer for ferrous metals combining excellent adhesion with corrosion inhibiting pigments. Compatible with most alkyd, epoxy, and polyurethane topcoat systems. Industry-standard primer for structural steel, machinery, and equipment in industrial and commercial environments.

name: Pro Industrial DTM Acrylic Coating
description: Industrial-grade waterborne DTM acrylic coating with enhanced corrosion resistance and durability for demanding commercial and light industrial environments. Suitable for structural steel, HVAC equipment, and industrial piping. Can be applied to clean metal or over compatible primers.

name: Pro Industrial Acrylic Coating
description: 100% acrylic industrial topcoat delivering excellent weathering resistance, colour retention, and chemical resistance for exterior and interior industrial surfaces. Suitable over primed steel, concrete, and masonry in commercial and light industrial environments. Low VOC and fast recoat.

name: Waterbased Galvite
description: Waterborne cold galvanizing compound that provides galvanic protection to steel surfaces similar to hot-dip galvanizing. High-zinc content primer for structural steel, welds, and cut edges where corrosion protection is critical. Low VOC with water cleanup and fast dry for production environments.

name: Macropoxy 646 Fast Cure Epoxy
description: Fast-cure two-component polyamide epoxy for steel and concrete surfaces in industrial and marine environments. Excellent chemical resistance, abrasion resistance, and adhesion to properly prepared substrates. Can be applied in temperatures as low as -18°C (0°F) for year-round industrial use.

name: Macropoxy 920 Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant two-component epoxy mastic for marginal surface preparation on steel and concrete. Excellent adhesion to hand-cleaned or rusted steel (SSPC-SP 2/3) reducing surface preparation costs. Used in maintenance painting of bridges, industrial structures, and storage tanks.

name: Macropoxy 5400 High Build Epoxy
description: High-build two-component epoxy for immersion service and chemical exposure on steel and concrete. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance for tank linings, secondary containment, and industrial floors. High-solids formula applied in thick single coats reduces application labour.

name: Tile Clad HS Epoxy
description: High-solids two-component epoxy finish coat for industrial facilities, food processing plants, and pharmaceutical environments. Outstanding chemical resistance to a broad range of solvents, acids, and alkalis. High-build film in a single coat with a smooth, cleanable semi-gloss finish.

name: Tile Clad II WB Epoxy
description: Waterborne two-component epoxy finish coat with excellent chemical resistance for industrial and institutional environments. Low odour and low VOC for occupied facilities and food processing areas where solvent-borne systems are not appropriate. Easy water cleanup and fast return to service.

name: Dura-Plate 235 Epoxy
description: General-purpose two-component epoxy for a wide range of industrial and marine environments. Good chemical resistance, excellent adhesion, and versatility as a mid-coat or finish coat in multi-layer systems. Suitable for steel, concrete, and previously coated surfaces after surface preparation.

name: Dura-Plate UHS Epoxy
description: Ultra high-solids two-component epoxy applied at high film builds to meet VOC regulations and reduce the number of coats required. Excellent performance in chemical, petroleum, and marine environments. One thick coat replaces two conventional epoxy coats for significant labour savings.

name: Hi-Build Epoxy Master
description: General-purpose two-component industrial epoxy that can be used as primer, mid-coat, or finish coat in industrial maintenance systems. Versatile formulation compatible with a wide range of topcoats. Good chemical resistance and flexibility for steel and concrete in industrial environments.

name: Zinc Clad IV Organic Zinc Rich Primer
description: Organic zinc-rich epoxy primer providing galvanic protection to structural steel in aggressive industrial and marine environments. High zinc content forms a sacrificial anode system protecting the steel even when the coating is damaged. Excellent adhesion to abrasive blast cleaned steel (SSPC-SP 6/10).

name: Zinc Clad III HS Organic Zinc Primer
description: High-solids organic zinc-rich primer for structural steel requiring maximum galvanic protection and corrosion resistance. High-solids formulation exceeds most VOC regulations while delivering a thick zinc-rich film in one coat. Excellent weldability and compatible with most industrial topcoats.

name: Corothane I HS Urethane Topcoat
description: High-solids two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with outstanding UV resistance, gloss retention, and colour stability. Ideal as the finish coat in high-performance industrial coating systems on steel, concrete, and masonry. Provides a durable, chemical-resistant film in harsh exterior environments.

name: Corothane I Galvapac Moisture Cure Urethane
description: Moisture-cure urethane zinc primer that cures by reacting with atmospheric moisture, making it suitable for cold weather and humid conditions. Provides excellent galvanic protection to steel and can be topcoated even in freezing temperatures. Essential for year-round industrial maintenance work.

name: Polane HS Urethane
description: High-solids two-component aliphatic polyurethane finish coat for industrial equipment, machinery, and vehicles requiring maximum gloss retention, colour stability, and chemical resistance. Frequently specified for OEM manufacturing and shop-applied coatings on agricultural and construction equipment.

name: Polane T Urethane Topcoat
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with excellent gloss, colour retention, and resistance to weathering, chemicals, and abrasion. Used in industrial maintenance and OEM applications on steel, aluminium, and primed surfaces. Good pot life and application flexibility.

name: Recoatable Epoxy Primer
description: Two-component epoxy primer designed for multi-coat industrial systems on blast-cleaned steel. Excellent adhesion, corrosion resistance, and unlimited recoat window when used within system guidelines. Serves as the foundation in high-performance coating systems for bridges, tanks, and industrial structures.

name: Waterjack Epoxy
description: Two-component waterborne epoxy for immersion service applications on steel and concrete. Excellent resistance to water, sewage, and mild chemical splash in water treatment facilities, manholes, and secondary containment. Low odour and VOC for use in confined space applications.

name: Heavy Duty Acrylic Floor Paint
description: Heavy-duty waterborne acrylic floor coating for concrete garage floors, basement floors, and light commercial areas. Excellent abrasion, chemical, and impact resistance for high-traffic surfaces. Non-slip aggregate additive option available for safety on wet or oily surfaces.

name: Hi-Build Epoxy Floor Coating
description: Two-component high-build epoxy floor coating for industrial and commercial concrete floors requiring maximum chemical and abrasion resistance. Applied at 4–8 mils DFT for a durable, seamless floor system suitable for food processing, pharmaceutical, and manufacturing environments.

name: Sanitile 100 Epoxy Floor Coating
description: Two-component epoxy floor system designed specifically for food and beverage processing facilities, pharmaceutical plants, and other areas requiring high sanitation standards. Excellent chemical resistance to cleaning agents, acids, and alkalis. Non-porous, cleanable surface that resists microbial growth.

name: ProMar Dryfall Acrylic Latex
description: Water-based acrylic dryfall coating for spray application to ceilings and upper wall areas in commercial and industrial buildings. Overspray dries to a powder before it reaches the floor, simplifying cleanup. Fast dry and low odour for occupied building applications.

name: ProMar Dryfall Alkyd
description: Alkyd dryfall enamel for spray application to ceilings and structural elements in commercial and industrial construction. Overspray falls dry to the floor for easy sweeping. Solvent-borne formula provides a harder, more durable finish than acrylic dryfall for demanding applications.

name: Aura Interior Paint
description: Benjamin Moore's flagship interior paint with proprietary Colour Lock technology that delivers unmatched depth of colour, durability, and washability. Zero VOC and available in over 3,500 colours. The industry benchmark for premium residential and commercial interior work.

name: Aura Bath & Spa Matte
description: Purpose-built zero-VOC interior paint for high-humidity environments with an ultra-matte finish that resists mould and mildew. The matte sheen makes surface imperfections less visible in steam-prone areas. Combines Aura's premium colour technology with enhanced moisture resistance.

name: Regal Select Interior Paint
description: Mid-premium professional-grade interior paint with excellent hide, durability, and application properties. The preferred choice of professional painters for residential and commercial repaint and new construction. Low VOC and available in all BM colours across a full range of sheens.

name: Scuff-X Interior Paint
description: Purpose-built interior paint with built-in scuff resistance technology that prevents marks and scuffs before they happen. The first paint technology to physically resist scuffing, ideal for high-traffic areas, hallways, and kids' rooms. Zero VOC with excellent hide and washability.

name: Natura Interior Paint
description: Certified Asthma & Allergy Friendly interior paint with zero VOC, zero emissions, and no added biocides. The greenest paint in the BM lineup, suitable for nurseries, hospitals, schools, and LEED projects. Excellent hide and washability without compromising indoor air quality.

name: ben Interior Paint
description: Entry-level professional interior latex delivering reliable performance at a competitive price point. Zero VOC formula with good hide, application properties, and full colour availability. A dependable choice for residential repaint and new construction work at the economy tier.

name: Century Interior Paint
description: Ultra-premium interior paint with maximum hide in a single coat, outstanding colour accuracy, and exceptional durability. Formulated with premium pigments for vibrant, long-lasting colour with superior coverage. Zero VOC for any interior application requiring the highest possible quality.

name: Ultra Spec 500 Interior Paint
description: Professional contractor-grade interior latex engineered for production painting in commercial and residential new construction. Zero VOC with excellent hide, workability, and coverage at an economy contractor price. The BM standard for commercial new construction specifications.

name: Ultra Spec SCUFF-X Interior Paint
description: Contractor-grade interior paint combining the economy pricing of Ultra Spec 500 with the built-in scuff resistance technology of Scuff-X. Zero VOC and engineered for high-traffic commercial applications where durability is needed at a production price point.

name: Waterborne Ceiling Paint
description: Ultra-flat zero-VOC ceiling paint with a spatter-resistant formula and exceptional uniformity of sheen. Designed to minimise flash on touch-ups and provide a consistent, non-reflective surface. The professional standard for both brush/roll and spray ceiling applications in commercial work.

name: Studio Finishes Metallic Interior
description: Decorative metallic interior coating creating a lustrous, jewel-like finish for feature walls and accent elements. Available in a range of metal tones including gold, silver, copper, and bronze. Low VOC, water-based formula with excellent durability for interior decorative applications.

name: Aura Exterior Paint
description: BM's premium exterior paint with Colour Lock technology delivering superior fade resistance, durability, and moisture protection. Self-priming on previously painted surfaces and excellent adhesion to all properly prepared substrates. Backed by a lifetime guarantee on fade and colour retention.

name: Regal Select Exterior Paint
description: Mid-premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with excellent adhesion, flexibility, and UV resistance for residential and commercial exterior surfaces. Low VOC and suitable for wood, hardboard, and cementitious substrates. A trusted professional exterior specification across Canada.

name: ben Exterior Paint
description: Entry-level 100% acrylic exterior latex delivering reliable weather resistance and colour retention at a competitive contractor price. Low VOC and suitable for production exterior painting on residential siding, trim, and fencing. Full colour availability in the BM colour system.

name: Ultra Spec EXT Exterior Paint
description: Professional contractor-grade exterior latex for production painting in residential and commercial new construction and repaint. Low VOC with good hide, adhesion, and weather resistance at a production price. Available in a full sheen range for contractor specifications.

name: Exterior Low Lustre Paint
description: Classic 100% acrylic exterior paint in a single low-lustre sheen for residential siding and trim. Good adhesion, washability, and UV resistance at an economical price point. Available in a full range of BM colours.

name: Carriage House Exterior Oil Paint
description: Traditional alkyd oil-based exterior paint for wood doors, trim, and shutters requiring the depth and hardness of an oil finish. Excellent penetration, levelling, and gloss retention. Requires mineral spirits cleanup and extended dry time but provides superior tannin and bleed blocking.

name: Fresh Start All-Purpose Primer
description: Highest-performing 100% acrylic interior/exterior primer with excellent adhesion to almost any properly prepared substrate. Seals porous surfaces, improves topcoat uniformity, and dries quickly for production work. The professional standard for interior drywall, wood, and previously painted surfaces.

name: Fresh Start High-Hiding All-Purpose Primer
description: High-hiding 100% acrylic primer formulated for maximum coverage over dark colours and stains. Reduces the number of finish coats required when making significant colour changes. Excellent for renovation work over existing painted surfaces requiring maximum opacity.

name: Fresh Start Exterior Wood Primer
description: 100% acrylic exterior wood primer with excellent penetration into bare and weathered wood for strong topcoat adhesion. Alkali-resistant for use on masonry and fibre-cement siding. Low VOC and fast drying for efficient production exterior priming work.

name: Fresh Start Drywall Primer
description: PVA-based new drywall primer sealer that seals the paper face and mud compound for uniform topcoat absorption. Fast drying and excellent for production new construction priming. Provides a uniform sealed surface that reduces topcoat consumption on new drywall.

name: Masonry Alkali-Resistant Primer
description: 100% acrylic alkali-resistant primer for new and existing masonry, concrete block, brick, and stucco. Seals and consolidates porous surfaces while providing an alkaline-resistant barrier for topcoat systems. Recommended before any latex or alkyd paint on masonry substrates.

name: Quick Dry Prime Coat
description: Fast-drying interior latex primer that can be recoated in as little as 1 hour. Excellent for production work where rapid cycle times are essential. Good adhesion and hide for use over bare drywall, previously painted surfaces, and raw wood on interior projects.

name: Fast Sanding Primer
description: High-build primer that dries to a powder-soft consistency and sands to a smooth, dust-free surface in approximately 1 hour. Ideal for filling and levelling minor imperfections in drywall, plaster, and wood. Dramatically speeds up the finishing process on renovation and new construction work.

name: Ultra Spec HP DTM Primer Sealer
description: High-performance waterborne direct-to-metal primer sealer for ferrous and non-ferrous metals. Rust-inhibitive formula with excellent adhesion, corrosion protection, and compatibility with a wide range of topcoat systems. Low VOC and suitable for both interior and exterior metal surfaces.

name: Insl-X Stix Waterborne Bonding Primer
description: Exceptional adhesion primer that bonds to virtually any surface including glass, ceramic tile, metal, PVC, fibreglass, and glossy paint without sanding. The industry standard for renovation work on difficult surfaces. Low odour and low VOC formula with fast dry and excellent topcoat compatibility.

name: Insl-X Aqua Lock Plus Primer
description: Advanced stain-blocking water and oil-based primer sealer that blocks water stains, smoke, nicotine, tannin, and other heavy stains. Fast-drying waterborne formula with low odour and VOC. Suitable for interior and exterior surfaces on both new and previously painted substrates.

name: Insl-X Prime Lock Alkyd Sealer
description: Alkyd-based sealer and stain blocker for severe staining problems including nicotine, fire damage, water stains, and marker. Solvent-borne formula provides aggressive blocking of stains that water-based primers cannot stop. For use on interior surfaces before any latex or alkyd topcoat.

name: Insl-X Vinyl & Plastic Bonding Primer
description: Specialty primer formulated specifically to bond to vinyl, PVC, and hard-to-paint plastic surfaces. Provides maximum adhesion for topcoats on vinyl siding, shutters, plastic trim, and fibreglass without surface sanding. Low VOC waterborne formula.

name: Advance Waterborne Interior Alkyd Paint
description: Market-leading waterborne alkyd paint that flows and levels like an oil-based paint while cleaning up with water. Provides a factory-like hard finish on cabinets, doors, and trim with superior chip and mar resistance. The professional standard for high-end kitchen cabinet refinishing and millwork.

name: Cabinet Coat Enamel
description: Specifically formulated to give existing cabinets and furniture a factory-like finish without brush marks. Self-levelling formula fills fine sanding scratches and delivers a smooth, hard enamel surface. Excellent adhesion to previously painted surfaces with minimal surface preparation required.

name: Satin Impervo Alkyd
description: Premium oil-based alkyd enamel for interior trim, doors, and millwork where the depth and hardness of an oil finish is required. Exceptional flow and levelling properties produce a mirror-smooth surface. The classic choice for high-end trim work in heritage and custom residential projects.

name: Impervo Alkyd High Gloss
description: Premium oil-based high-gloss enamel delivering a brilliant, mirror-like finish on interior trim, doors, and furniture. Exceptional hardness, chemical resistance, and durability. The traditional high-end choice for front doors, wainscoting, and decorative trim requiring maximum gloss and durability.

name: ben Waterborne Alkyd Gloss
description: Economy-priced waterborne alkyd providing a hard, durable gloss finish on interior trim, doors, and windows. Water cleanup with alkyd performance at an entry-level price point. Good flow and levelling for smooth results on standard trim work.

name: Arborcoat Semi-Transparent Exterior Stain
description: Waterborne semi-transparent exterior stain with UV absorbers that preserve wood grain and colour while protecting against weathering. Excellent penetration into wood fibres for long-lasting colour without cracking or peeling. Suitable for decks, fences, siding, and log homes.

name: Arborcoat Solid Colour Exterior Stain
description: 100% acrylic solid colour exterior stain that provides opaque coverage without the cracking or peeling of conventional paint. Excellent adhesion, UV resistance, and flexibility for decks, fences, and siding. Does not trap moisture under a film, reducing the risk of blistering.

name: Arborcoat Exterior Oil Stain
description: Oil-based penetrating exterior stain for maximum wood penetration and deep colour saturation. Provides superior moisture protection and nourishes wood fibres from within. Recommended for weathered or thirsty wood where deep penetration is needed for long-lasting protection.

name: Arborcoat Semi-Solid Exterior Stain
description: Semi-solid exterior stain positioned between semi-transparent and solid for customers wanting more colour coverage while still allowing some wood grain to show through. Good UV protection and durability for decks and siding. 100% acrylic waterborne formula.

name: Woodluxe Semi-Transparent Deck & Siding Stain
description: Waterborne semi-transparent deck stain with advanced penetrating technology for excellent wood protection while allowing natural grain to show. UV inhibitors prevent colour fade and the water-repellent formula resists moisture penetration. Suitable for new and weathered wood decks and siding.

name: Woodluxe Solid Deck & Siding Stain
description: Waterborne solid colour deck and siding stain delivering full colour coverage without the cracking or peeling of conventional paint. 100% acrylic formula with excellent adhesion, UV resistance, and flexibility. Ideal for weathered decks and siding requiring solid colour transformation.

name: Gel Stain Interior
description: Thick, controllable gel formula for staining interior wood surfaces, particularly difficult-to-stain species like pine, birch, and maple. The gel consistency prevents blotching and allows precise colour placement on vertical surfaces without dripping. Excellent for furniture, doors, and trim.

name: Elastomeric Masonry Stucco & Brick Paint
description: High-build 100% acrylic elastomeric coating for stucco, brick, and masonry that bridges hairline cracks and provides a waterproof, flexible film. Excellent for exterior masonry walls, retaining walls, and block buildings in all weather conditions. Resists efflorescence and moisture infiltration.

name: Concrete Waterproofer Paint
description: 100% acrylic waterproofing coating for masonry walls, block, and concrete that stops water infiltration under moderate hydrostatic pressure. Suitable for interior and exterior masonry surfaces, including basement walls. Easy brush or roller application with a flat, natural finish.

name: Moorcraft Super Spec Masonry Block Filler
description: High-build 100% acrylic latex block filler for filling pores in concrete block (CMU) before applying topcoats. Provides a smooth, sealed surface that reduces paint consumption and improves the appearance of the finish coat. Essential first coat on split-face and aggregate block.

name: Masonry Waterproofer Interior
description: Interior latex waterproofing paint specifically formulated for basement walls and below-grade masonry surfaces. Stops water penetration from outside on concrete, block, and poured masonry walls. Easy application and seals both poured concrete and block foundations.

name: Acrylic Concrete & Masonry Sealer
description: Clear penetrating acrylic sealer for interior and exterior concrete and masonry surfaces. Provides a water-repellent film that prevents dusting, staining, and moisture absorption without changing the surface appearance. Fast-drying with a natural, non-yellowing finish.

name: IronClad Latex Low Lustre Metal & Wood Enamel
description: Waterborne alkyd rust-inhibitive enamel for ferrous metals, structural steel, and wood. Built-in rust inhibitors provide long-lasting corrosion protection without alkyd odour. Excellent adhesion, chip resistance, and durability for both interior and exterior metal surfaces in commercial and light industrial use.

name: IronClad Alkyd High Gloss Metal Enamel
description: Oil-based alkyd rust-inhibitive metal enamel delivering a high-gloss, hard finish on structural steel, machinery, and equipment. Traditional solvent-borne formula for maximum corrosion protection and gloss retention in demanding industrial environments.

name: IronClad Urethane Metal Enamel
description: Urethane-modified alkyd metal enamel combining the durability of urethane with the rust-inhibitive properties of alkyd. Excellent abrasion, chemical, and impact resistance for machinery, equipment, and structural metal exposed to moderate to heavy industrial service conditions.

name: Corotech Waterborne Alkyd Metal Primer
description: Waterborne alkyd rust-inhibitive primer for ferrous and non-ferrous metal surfaces. Provides excellent adhesion and corrosion protection as a primer in multi-coat industrial systems. Low VOC with fast dry and recoat, compatible with most industrial topcoats.

name: Corotech DTM Acrylic Coating
description: Direct-to-metal acrylic coating for ferrous and non-ferrous metal surfaces in commercial and light industrial environments. Excellent corrosion protection, adhesion, and durability as a finish coat or mid-coat. Low VOC with good colour and gloss retention for exterior exposure.

name: Corotech Waterborne Epoxy
description: Two-component waterborne epoxy finish for industrial and institutional applications where chemical resistance and durability are required. Suitable for steel, concrete, and masonry in food processing, pharmaceutical, and manufacturing environments. Low odour and fast return to service.

name: Corotech Acrylic Gloss Enamel
description: Industrial acrylic gloss enamel for exterior and interior industrial structures, equipment, and piping. Excellent UV resistance, colour retention, and weathering resistance as a finish coat in multi-coat industrial maintenance systems. Low VOC with good adhesion to primed ferrous and non-ferrous metals.

name: Corotech Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant two-component epoxy mastic for steel and concrete in industrial maintenance. Excellent adhesion to hand-cleaned or power tool cleaned steel (SSPC-SP 2/3). Suitable for bridges, industrial structures, and tank exteriors where blast cleaning is impractical.

name: Corotech High Build Epoxy
description: Two-component high-build epoxy for industrial environments requiring maximum chemical resistance and thick-film protection. Applied at 6–10 mils DFT for complete encapsulation of blast-cleaned steel. Suitable for tank linings, secondary containment, and industrial floor systems.

name: Corotech Polyurethane Finish
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with outstanding UV resistance and colour stability for the most demanding industrial and marine environments. Excellent gloss retention, chemical resistance, and flexibility. Finish coat for high-performance multi-coat systems on structural steel and concrete.

name: Corotech Aliphatic Urethane
description: Premium two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat delivering maximum gloss, colour retention, and weathering resistance for industrial and architectural applications. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance for high-visibility industrial equipment, pipelines, and architectural metalwork.

name: Corotech Zinc Rich Primer
description: Organic zinc-rich epoxy primer providing maximum galvanic protection to blast-cleaned structural steel in aggressive industrial and marine environments. High zinc content forms a sacrificial protection barrier. Meets or exceeds most international specifications for zinc-rich primers.

name: Corotech Epoxy Primer
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer for blast-cleaned steel in multi-coat industrial and marine systems. Excellent adhesion, corrosion inhibition, and compatibility with a wide range of epoxy and polyurethane topcoats. The standard BM Corotech primer for high-performance protective coating systems.

name: Floor & Patio Latex Enamel
description: Waterborne floor enamel for interior and exterior concrete floors, garage floors, basements, and porches. Excellent abrasion and impact resistance for residential and light commercial traffic. Low VOC and easy water cleanup with a durable, cleanable finish in flat or gloss.

name: Corotech Waterborne Epoxy Floor Coating
description: Two-component waterborne epoxy floor coating for industrial and commercial concrete floors requiring chemical and abrasion resistance. Provides a hard, seamless, easily cleaned surface suitable for food processing, pharmaceutical, and manufacturing floor systems. Low odour for occupied facilities.

name: Insl-X AQUABAR B Moisture Barrier
description: Waterborne moisture vapour barrier for interior concrete floors before installing floor coverings, epoxy coatings, or adhesives. Reduces vapour emission rates to acceptable levels and prevents adhesive failure due to moisture vapour transmission from concrete slabs.

name: Moores Dryfall Latex
description: Commercial acrylic dryfall latex for spray application to ceilings and upper wall areas in commercial and industrial buildings. Overspray dries to a fine powder before reaching the floor, eliminating the need for extensive masking and floor protection. Low VOC and fast dry.

name: Ultra Premium Interior
description: Cloverdale's flagship interior latex with outstanding hide, washability, and colour retention. Features advanced resin technology for a smooth durable finish in high-traffic areas. Available in all sheens across thousands of colours.

name: Platinum Interior
description: Premium mid-tier interior acrylic latex with excellent hide and smooth application. Durable washable finish for walls and ceilings in residential and light commercial interiors. Reliable production paint for professional contractors.

name: Expressions Interior
description: Mid-range 100% acrylic interior latex offering reliable hide, smooth application, and good washability. A versatile everyday paint for walls and ceilings in residential applications. Easy to apply by brush, roller, or spray.

name: Pro40 Interior
description: Professional contractor-grade interior latex with high solids and excellent hide for efficient production painting. Flat, eggshell, and satin finishes for multi-unit residential and commercial projects. Minimizes coats required per job.

name: Pro Giant Interior
description: Economy contractor-grade interior flat latex for new construction production painting. Provides reliable coverage at a cost-effective price point for builders covering large surface areas. Excellent spread rate and fast dry time.

name: Zero VOC Interior
description: Zero VOC 100% acrylic interior latex for sensitive environments including healthcare, schools, and occupied spaces. LEED-compliant with negligible odour. Excellent washability and durability without compromising air quality.

name: Kitchen & Bath Interior
description: Moisture and mildew resistant interior latex formulated for kitchens, bathrooms, and high-humidity areas. Inhibits mould and mildew growth with a durable easy-to-clean finish that stands up to frequent washing.

name: Ceiling White
description: Ultra flat spatter-resistant latex for ceilings. Provides maximum hide with minimal splatter during roller application. The dead-flat sheen minimizes surface imperfections and eliminates glare for a clean uniform ceiling appearance.

name: Vapour Barrier Paint
description: Interior vapour barrier coating for concrete masonry and basement walls that controls moisture vapour transmission. Meets Canadian building code requirements as a Class II vapour retarder. Provides a flat paintable surface.

name: Waterborne Alkyd Interior
description: Waterborne alkyd providing the hard durable finish of oil-based paint with the easy cleanup of latex. Ideal for doors, trim, cabinets, and furniture where a hard scuff-resistant finish is required. Excellent levelling and blocking.

name: Cloverdale Flex Exterior
description: Cloverdale's premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with enhanced flexibility to resist cracking and peeling through Western Canada's freeze-thaw cycles. Excellent adhesion to wood, stucco, fibre cement, and previously painted surfaces.

name: Weather Ready Exterior
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior latex formulated for Western Canadian climates with superior resistance to UV fading, moisture, and temperature extremes. Suitable for wood, hardboard, fibre cement, stucco, and masonry substrates.

name: Pro Exterior Latex
description: Professional contractor-grade 100% acrylic exterior latex for production painting of residential siding and trim. Provides good hide, adhesion, and weather resistance at a contractor price point for large-volume projects.

name: Exterior Oil Based Paint
description: Traditional oil-based alkyd exterior paint providing excellent adhesion, penetration, and durability on weathered and bare wood. Ideal for repainting chalky or porous surfaces. Resistant to moisture and UV degradation.

name: Alkyd Semi-Gloss Enamel
description: Oil-based alkyd semi-gloss enamel delivering a hard durable finish for interior doors, trim, windows, and millwork. Excellent levelling for a smooth surface with outstanding adhesion and resistance to household cleaners.

name: Alkyd Gloss Enamel
description: Oil-based alkyd gloss enamel providing a high-gloss mirror-like finish for interior trim, doors, and furniture. Outstanding durability, levelling, and hardness for surfaces requiring maximum wear resistance.

name: Interior Latex Primer Sealer
description: General-purpose interior latex primer for drywall, plaster, and wood. Provides excellent adhesion and holdout for topcoats, sealing the substrate for uniform sheen and colour. Dries fast and sands easily.

name: High Build Drywall Primer
description: High-build latex primer for new drywall that fills tool marks, minor imperfections, and joint compound ridges. Provides superior holdout and a uniform surface for premium topcoat performance. Reduces topcoat consumption significantly.

name: Exterior Latex Primer
description: 100% acrylic exterior primer for wood, hardboard, fibre cement, and previously painted surfaces. Excellent adhesion and alkali resistance for use over cementitious substrates. Fast drying for next-day topcoating.

name: Exterior Oil Primer
description: Alkyd oil-based exterior primer for weathered, bare, or difficult-to-adhere surfaces including knot-bearing wood and old chalky paint. Deep penetration provides excellent adhesion for oil and latex topcoats.

name: Bonding Primer
description: Waterborne acrylic bonding primer that adheres to glossy and hard-to-paint surfaces including tile, glass, metal, and coated surfaces without sanding. Interior and exterior use on problem substrates.

name: Masonry Primer
description: Alkali-resistant acrylic primer for concrete, masonry, stucco, and block. Neutralizes alkali salts, seals pores, and provides a uniform surface for latex topcoats. Can be applied to damp or green concrete.

name: Stain Blocking Primer
description: Waterborne stain-blocking primer that seals water and oil-based stains including smoke, nicotine, grease, and tannin bleed. Fast drying for same-day topcoating with minimal odour for occupied spaces.

name: Alkyd Primer Sealer
description: Oil-based alkyd primer sealer for wood and metal providing excellent stain blocking, adhesion, and surface sealing. Compatible with oil and latex topcoats. Ideal for knot-bearing wood, new wood, and bare metal.

name: Woodsman Semi-Transparent Stain
description: Oil-based semi-transparent penetrating stain for cedar, redwood, pine, and exterior wood surfaces. Penetrates deep into the grain to reveal natural wood texture while providing UV and water protection.

name: Woodsman Solid Stain
description: 100% acrylic solid colour exterior stain for wood siding, fences, and decks. Full colour coverage while still allowing wood texture to show. Excellent adhesion and flexibility to resist peeling and cracking over time.

name: Woodsman Penetrating Oil Finish
description: Deep penetrating oil finish for cedar, redwood, and naturally oily hardwoods. Protects against UV, moisture, and weathering by nourishing the wood fibre. Ideal for log homes, decks, and cedar siding.

name: Woodsman Semi-Solid Stain
description: 100% acrylic semi-solid stain providing coverage between semi-transparent and solid, allowing some grain to show with enhanced colour depth and UV protection. Good for rejuvenating weathered wood.

name: Exterior Solid Latex Stain
description: Waterborne solid colour siding stain providing full colour coverage on wood and hardboard siding. 100% acrylic for excellent UV resistance, flexibility, and adhesion. Resists peeling better than paint on rough-sawn wood.

name: Deck & Siding Stain
description: 100% acrylic semi-transparent deck and siding stain that penetrates and protects wood while highlighting the natural grain. Water-repellent and UV-resistant for horizontal deck boards and vertical siding.

name: Heavy Duty Block Filler
description: High-build latex block filler for concrete block, rough masonry, and tilt-up concrete. Fills voids and surface pores in one coat to create a smooth paintable surface. Excellent adhesion and alkali resistance.

name: Elastomeric Wall Coating
description: 100% acrylic elastomeric coating for exterior masonry, stucco, and concrete. Bridges hairline cracks and provides a waterproof barrier that flexes with building movement. Excellent UV resistance for long-term protection.

name: Concrete Masonry Sealer
description: Clear penetrating acrylic sealer for concrete, masonry, and brick. Repels water while allowing the substrate to breathe, preventing moisture infiltration and freeze-thaw damage. Also functions as primer under masonry topcoats.

name: Concrete Stain
description: Waterborne semi-transparent concrete stain for interior and exterior floors and surfaces. Penetrates into concrete to provide a durable coloured finish while maintaining natural texture. Available in earthy and stone tones.

name: Masonry Paint
description: 100% acrylic masonry and stucco paint with excellent alkali resistance for concrete, block, stucco, and brick. Provides a breathable durable finish that resists efflorescence. Suitable for interior and exterior masonry.

name: DTM Acrylic Primer Finish
description: Direct-to-metal waterborne acrylic coating that serves as both primer and finish on cleaned ferrous and non-ferrous metals. Rust inhibitive formula with excellent adhesion, corrosion resistance, and colour retention.

name: Rust Inhibitive Primer
description: Waterborne rust inhibitive primer for ferrous metals. Contains corrosion inhibitors that prevent rust formation and provide excellent adhesion to steel and iron. Compatible with alkyd and acrylic topcoats.

name: Industrial Alkyd Enamel
description: Oil-based industrial alkyd enamel for steel structures, equipment, and piping. Provides a hard durable finish with good chemical and solvent resistance. Suitable for maintenance painting in industrial and commercial facilities.

name: Anti Corrosive Metal Primer
description: Alkyd anti-corrosive metal primer containing zinc phosphate corrosion inhibitors for superior rust protection on steel and iron. Excellent adhesion and compatibility with most alkyd and acrylic topcoats.

name: Industrial Latex Enamel
description: Waterborne industrial enamel for walls, floors, and equipment in manufacturing, warehousing, and food processing facilities. Hard washable finish with good chemical and abrasion resistance. Meets institutional VOC requirements.

name: Waterborne Epoxy
description: Two-component waterborne epoxy for concrete and steel in light industrial environments. Excellent chemical resistance, hardness, and adhesion with low VOC and minimal odour suitable for occupied facilities.

name: Epoxy Floor Coating
description: Two-component epoxy floor system for concrete in warehouses, manufacturing plants, and commercial kitchens. Excellent abrasion, chemical, and impact resistance with a seamless easy-to-clean finish.

name: Anti Graffiti Coating
description: Sacrificial anti-graffiti topcoat for concrete, masonry, and painted surfaces. Creates a barrier allowing graffiti removal with water or mild cleaners without damaging the substrate. For transit stations, underpasses, and public infrastructure.

name: Intumescent Fire Retardant
description: Waterborne intumescent fire retardant coating for wood and steel. Expands on heat exposure to form an insulating char layer that delays structural failure and slows flame spread. Meets fire rating requirements for commercial construction.

name: Floor & Porch Enamel
description: Durable floor enamel for wood and concrete floors, porches, and steps. Provides a tough washable slip-resistant surface that resists scuffing and foot traffic. Suitable for interior and protected exterior applications.

name: Urethane Floor Finish
description: Waterborne polyurethane floor coating for concrete and wood floors with exceptional hardness, abrasion resistance, and chemical resistance. Ideal for commercial warehouses, retail spaces, and gyms needing a durable attractive floor.

name: Dryfall Acrylic
description: Spray-applied acrylic dryfall for ceilings and overhead surfaces in commercial and industrial buildings. Overspray dries to a powder before reaching the floor, protecting floors and equipment below during application.

name: Carboguard 60
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer and finish coat for concrete, masonry, and steel. Provides excellent adhesion, chemical resistance, and durability in moderate industrial environments. Can be used as a standalone system or under urethane topcoats.

name: Carboguard 60 LT
description: Low temperature cure version of Carboguard 60 polyamide epoxy, formulated for application and cure in temperatures down to 0°F (-18°C). Same performance profile as standard Carboguard 60 for cold weather maintenance painting.

name: Carboguard 165
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer for steel and concrete. Excellent corrosion resistance and compatibility with a broad range of topcoats. Used extensively as a primer in multi-coat systems for bridges, tanks, and structural steel.

name: Carboguard 690
description: High-build two-component epoxy for steel and concrete in moderate chemical environments. Excellent resistance to splash and spillage of acids, alkalis, and solvents. Used in chemical plants, water treatment facilities, and secondary containment.

name: Carboguard 890
description: High-build two-component epoxy widely used in oil, gas, and petrochemical industries for steel and concrete. Provides superior corrosion protection with excellent abrasion and chemical resistance in moderate service environments.

name: Carboguard 890 GF
description: Glass flake-reinforced high-build epoxy for immersion service and severe chemical environments. The glass flake filler extends the moisture permeation path, providing outstanding barrier protection for tanks, splash zones, and secondary containment.

name: Carboguard 893
description: High-build novolac epoxy for severe chemical service environments including exposure to concentrated acids and solvents. Excellent thermal resistance up to 250°F dry. Used in chemical processing, pulp and paper, and secondary containment.

name: Carboguard 1208
description: 100% solids polyurea-modified epoxy floor coating for heavy traffic and industrial floors. Outstanding abrasion and impact resistance with rapid return to service. Used in warehouses, manufacturing plants, and food processing facilities.

name: Carboguard 1340
description: Waterborne two-component epoxy for concrete floors in institutional and commercial facilities. Low odour and VOC for use in occupied spaces. Good chemical resistance and abrasion resistance suitable for light industrial applications.

name: Carboguard 6000
description: Water-dispersible two-component epoxy primer and finish for steel and concrete. Excellent adhesion and corrosion protection with low VOC. Suitable for use in areas where solvent-borne coatings are restricted.

name: Carboguard 888
description: Fast-cure two-component epoxy designed for cold weather applications and minimal downtime maintenance. Achieves usable cure at temperatures down to 35°F, with 4-hour recoat time. Comparable performance to standard epoxy systems.

name: Phenoline 305
description: Amine-cured phenolic epoxy for aggressive chemical immersion service including concentrated acids, caustics, and solvents. Used for lining tanks, vessels, and secondary containment structures in chemical and petrochemical industries.

name: Phenoline 368
description: Modified phenolic epoxy for aggressive chemical service including strong oxidizing and reducing acids. Excellent resistance to a broad spectrum of chemicals including crude oil, sour water, and hydrocarbons. Used for tank linings.

name: Plasite 4550
description: Vinyl ester lining for extremely aggressive chemical service including concentrated hydrofluoric and hydrochloric acids. Provides outstanding resistance to a broad range of chemicals in immersion. For industrial tank and vessel lining.

name: Plasite 7122
description: Phenolic epoxy tank lining for potable water, wastewater, and mild chemical service. NSF-61 certified for contact with drinking water. Used for lining steel and concrete water tanks, pipes, and water treatment structures.

name: Plasite 9062
description: Epoxy novolac for high temperature chemical service up to 300°F wet. Excellent resistance to aromatic solvents, acids, and caustics. Used for lining chemical storage tanks, process vessels, and high-temperature equipment.

name: Sanitile 255
description: FDA-compliant two-component epoxy coating for food and beverage processing facilities. Smooth seamless finish resists bacteria, mould, and mildew. Suitable for walls, floors, and equipment in USDA/FDA-inspected facilities.

name: Bitumastic 300M
description: Coal tar epoxy for buried steel, underground structures, and water immersion. Provides outstanding cathodic disbondment resistance and moisture barrier for pipelines, pilings, water tank exteriors, and buried piping systems.

name: Bitumastic 300SL
description: Solventless coal tar epoxy for severe immersion and splash/spillage service. 100% solids formula eliminates solvent entrapment in thick films. Used for ballast tanks, cofferdams, and severe water immersion where low VOC is required.

name: Carbozinc 11
description: Post-cure inorganic zinc-rich primer providing galvanic corrosion protection to structural steel. Zinc content >85% by weight in dry film. Industry standard for shop-applied primer on bridges, tanks, and structural steel fabrications.

name: Carbozinc 65
description: Waterborne inorganic zinc primer for structural steel providing galvanic protection with minimal VOC. Suitable for shop or field application where solvent restrictions apply. Self-curing with atmospheric moisture.

name: Carbozinc 621
description: Organic zinc-rich epoxy primer for corrosion protection of structural steel. Provides excellent cathodic protection and compatibility with epoxy and urethane topcoats. Used where a self-priming system is desired with zinc protection.

name: Carbozinc 859
description: Organic zinc-rich waterborne primer providing corrosion protection with low VOC. Field-applied primer for maintenance of existing structures where inorganic zinc is impractical. Compatible with waterborne and solvent-borne topcoats.

name: Carbothane 133 LH
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane low-gloss topcoat for structural steel and industrial equipment. Excellent UV stability, colour and gloss retention. Used as a final coat over epoxy systems where a satin/low-gloss finish is specified.

name: Carbothane 134 HG
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane high-gloss topcoat with outstanding UV stability and colour retention. Industry-leading durability for bridges, tanks, and offshore structures exposed to aggressive weathering environments.

name: Carbothane 134 MC
description: Moisture-cure aliphatic urethane topcoat that cures in high-humidity environments where two-component urethanes fail. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance with good UV stability. Used in offshore, marine, and high-humidity industrial environments.

name: Polyclad 855
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat for concrete floors and steel in industrial environments. Provides an attractive durable finish with good chemical resistance and UV stability for manufacturing and warehouse floors.

name: Carboline 1906
description: Intumescent epoxy fireproofing coating for structural steel in offshore and onshore industrial facilities. Provides passive fire protection by expanding on heat exposure to insulate structural members and extend evacuation time.

name: Carbomastic 15
description: Single-component moisture-cure urethane mastic for minimally prepared surfaces. Can be applied over tight rust, mill scale, and existing coatings. Excellent for maintenance painting where thorough surface preparation is not feasible.

name: Carbomastic 18
description: Alkyd-epoxy mastic for application over rusted surfaces with minimal surface preparation. Penetrating formula wets and displaces surface moisture to adhere to marginally prepared steel. Used for maintenance painting of bridges and structures.

name: Carbomastic 90
description: High-build two-component epoxy mastic for immersion service and severe atmospheric environments. Tolerates surface preparation as low as SP-3 power tool cleaning. Used in splash zones, offshore platforms, and maintenance of aging infrastructure.

name: Carboline 130 HB
description: High-build alkyd coating for steel structures requiring moderate corrosion protection. Can be applied in one coat to build film thickness quickly. Compatible with most standard topcoats for a complete system.

name: Rustbond Penetrating Sealer
description: Penetrating rust inhibitive primer that wets rusted steel surfaces and converts surface rust to a stable primer base. Provides a firm foundation for topcoat application over tightly adhering rust without sandblasting.

name: Carbocoat 15WB
description: Waterborne DTM acrylic coating for steel and concrete in moderate industrial environments. Rust inhibitive formula with low VOC suitable for use in food processing, pharmaceutical, and other VOC-restricted facilities.

name: Carbocrylic 120
description: Direct-to-metal acrylic primer and finish coat for ferrous and non-ferrous metals in light industrial environments. Rust inhibitive formula with good colour and gloss retention. Single-component for easy application and maintenance repainting.

name: Carbocrylic 3359
description: Acrylic masonry coating for exterior concrete and masonry surfaces. Provides a breathable water-repellent barrier that protects against moisture infiltration while allowing the substrate to breathe. Low VOC for environmentally sensitive projects.

name: Thermaline 450
description: Silicone-alkyd high temperature coating for surfaces operating up to 400°F (204°C). Provides corrosion protection and colour retention on piping, stacks, and equipment operating at elevated temperatures. Air dry or force cure.

name: Thermaline 840
description: 100% silicone high temperature coating for service up to 600°F (316°C). Suitable for stacks, boilers, heat exchangers, and piping operating at elevated temperatures. Provides corrosion protection and colour retention under thermal cycling.

name: Thermaline 4700
description: Extremely high temperature silicone coating for service up to 1200°F (649°C). For use on stacks, incinerators, kilns, and furnace components. Excellent resistance to oxidation and thermal cycling at extreme operating temperatures.

name: Pyrocrete 241
description: Cementitious fireproofing material for structural steel columns, beams, and decking. Provides UL-listed fire ratings up to 4 hours. Applied by spray, trowel, or casting to achieve specified fire ratings in commercial and industrial construction.

name: Intumescent 1340
description: Waterborne intumescent fireproofing for structural steel in commercial and industrial buildings. Expands dramatically on heat exposure to form an insulating char protecting steel from elevated temperatures. Provides a paintable decorative appearance.

name: Thermo-Lag 3000
description: Intumescent fireproofing system for process vessels, pipes, and structural members in petrochemical and refining facilities. Provides passive fire protection with hydrocarbon and jet fire resistance ratings for offshore and onshore facilities.

name: Carboline Sealate 23
description: Polyurethane construction joint sealant for expansion joints, perimeter joints, and cracks in concrete structures. Flexible and durable with excellent adhesion to concrete, metal, and masonry. Compatible with Carboline coating systems.

name: Plasite 9062 Novolac Floor
description: Epoxy novolac floor coating system for chemical-resistant concrete floors. Outstanding resistance to strong acids, caustics, and solvents. Used in chemical manufacturing, pharmaceutical, and food processing facilities requiring aggressive chemical protection.

name: Carboguard 1340 WB Floor
description: Waterborne two-component epoxy floor system for light industrial, commercial, and institutional concrete floors. Low odour for occupied spaces with good abrasion and chemical resistance. Easy cleanup and fast return to service.

name: Amercoat 235 Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant epoxy mastic for steel with minimal surface preparation requirements. Excellent adhesion to tight rust, old coatings, and mill scale. Used for maintenance of bridges, tanks, and structural steel in moderate corrosive environments.

name: Amercoat 240 Surface Tolerant Epoxy
description: Two-component epoxy for marginally prepared surfaces. Wets out and adheres to tight rust and minimally cleaned steel. Suitable for maintenance painting of existing structures where blast cleaning is not feasible.

name: Amercoat 385 Epoxy
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer and finish coat for steel and concrete. Provides excellent corrosion protection, adhesion, and chemical resistance in moderate industrial environments. Widely used in oil and gas and water treatment.

name: Amercoat 400 Epoxy
description: High-build two-component epoxy for industrial steel and concrete. Provides superior corrosion protection and chemical resistance. Used for tanks, vessels, piping, and structural steel in chemical and petrochemical environments.

name: Amercoat 450H HS Epoxy
description: High-solids two-component epoxy topcoat for demanding industrial service. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance with reduced VOC from high solids content. Used as a finish coat over epoxy primer systems in severe environments.

name: Amercoat 68 HS Epoxy
description: High-solids polyamide epoxy primer and intermediate coat for steel. Provides excellent corrosion resistance and adhesion as part of multi-coat systems for bridges, offshore platforms, and industrial structures.

name: Amercoat 391 Novolac Epoxy
description: Novolac epoxy for severe chemical service including exposure to concentrated acids, caustics, and aromatic solvents. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance at elevated temperatures up to 250°F. Used in chemical processing and tank lining.

name: Amercoat 78HB Coal Tar Epoxy
description: High-build coal tar epoxy for immersion service and buried steel. Provides outstanding moisture and cathodic disbondment resistance for underground pipelines, pilings, ballast tanks, and water storage structures.

name: Sigmaguard 750
description: Chemical-resistant epoxy lining for steel tanks and vessels in aggressive service including acids, caustics, and solvents. Provides high-build protection with excellent adhesion and chemical resistance for demanding industrial environments.

name: Sigmacover 256
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer and finish for steel and concrete in moderate industrial environments. Good corrosion protection, adhesion, and chemical resistance. Widely used in marine and industrial maintenance programs.

name: Sigmacover 300
description: High-build two-component epoxy for industrial steel and concrete. Provides excellent corrosion and chemical resistance as primer or intermediate in multi-coat systems. Used in offshore, power generation, and petrochemical facilities.

name: Sigmacover 410
description: Solvent-free two-component epoxy for concrete and steel floors in severe service environments. 100% solids formulation for immersion-grade protection with zero VOC. Used in chemical plants, offshore platforms, and secondary containment.

name: Sigmacover 522
description: Glass flake-reinforced epoxy for immersion and severe atmospheric service. The glass flake barrier significantly extends moisture permeation path for outstanding corrosion protection on tanks, splash zones, and offshore structures.

name: Sigmashield 820
description: Heavy-duty glass flake epoxy for immersion and severe splash/spillage service. Provides maximum barrier protection for ship hulls, offshore structures, and tanks in aggressive chemical environments. Multiple coats build thick film in fewer applications.

name: Sigmaline 280
description: Epoxy lining system for oil and gas transmission pipelines. Provides corrosion and chemical protection for the internal surface of carbon steel pipe. Smooth finish reduces friction for improved flow efficiency.

name: Sigmaline 410
description: Solvent-free epoxy pipeline lining for potable water contact and aggressive chemical service. Provides excellent protection with no solvent entrapment in thick film builds. Suitable for pump casings, valves, and fittings.

name: Dimetcote 6 Inorganic Zinc
description: Post-cure inorganic zinc-rich primer for structural steel providing galvanic corrosion protection. Industry standard shop primer for bridges, tanks, and structural fabrications. Zinc content >85% by weight in dry film.

name: Dimetcote 9 Inorganic Zinc
description: Self-curing inorganic zinc primer that cures with atmospheric moisture without a post-cure water mist. Suitable for field application. Provides galvanic zinc protection on structural steel for bridges, tanks, and offshore structures.

name: Amercoat 370 Organic Zinc
description: Organic zinc-rich primer for corrosion protection of structural steel. Compatible with epoxy and urethane topcoats. Suitable for shop or field application where inorganic zinc cure conditions cannot be met.

name: Sigmazinc 102
description: Two-component epoxy zinc-rich primer for structural steel. Provides galvanic protection with good compatibility across a wide range of topcoat systems. Used as primer in multi-coat systems for marine, offshore, and industrial structures.

name: Amercoat 68 HS Zinc
description: High-solids zinc-rich epoxy primer providing cathodic protection with reduced solvent and VOC. Suitable for shop and field application as a primer in multi-coat systems for industrial and marine structures.

name: Amerethane 450 HS Urethane
description: High-solids two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with excellent UV stability and colour retention. Premium topcoat for bridges, tanks, and structures exposed to aggressive UV and weathering. Exceptional long-term appearance retention.

name: Amercoat 450 Polyurethane
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat providing excellent gloss retention and UV stability. Used as a final coat over epoxy systems in industrial and architectural applications requiring long-term colour durability.

name: Sigmadur 550 Aliphatic Urethane
description: Premium two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with superior UV stability and gloss retention for long-term aesthetics. Recommended for demanding offshore, bridge, and infrastructure applications requiring extended maintenance cycles.

name: Sigmadur 520 Aliphatic Urethane
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane semi-gloss finish coat providing good UV resistance and chemical protection at an economical price point. Used over epoxy primers in industrial maintenance programs.

name: PPG Fluoropon Fluoropolymer
description: PVDF fluoropolymer topcoat providing maximum UV resistance and colour retention for architectural metal. Used on aluminium curtain wall, cladding, and exterior metal surfaces requiring 20+ year colour stability. Factory-applied finish.

name: Amercoat 370 Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant two-component epoxy mastic for steel requiring minimal surface preparation. Provides excellent adhesion over tight rust and existing coatings. Used for maintenance painting where thorough blast cleaning is not possible.

name: Devguard 4160 Alkyd Primer
description: Alkyd rust inhibitive primer for ferrous metals. Contains zinc chromate-free corrosion inhibitors for protection of steel in moderate industrial and commercial environments. Compatible with alkyd and many acrylic topcoats.

name: Devguard 4379 DTM Alkyd
description: Direct-to-metal alkyd coating providing both priming and finishing properties for steel and iron in light industrial environments. Good adhesion, corrosion resistance, and durability in a single-coat application.

name: Interzone 954
description: High-solids epoxy for splash zone and immersion service on offshore structures. Excellent resistance to seawater immersion, splash/splash zone exposure, and cathodic disbondment. Used on offshore platforms, jetties, and marine structures.

name: Interzinc 52
description: Waterborne inorganic zinc primer for structural steel providing galvanic protection. Self-curing with atmospheric moisture for easy field application. Low VOC suitable for areas with stringent solvent restrictions.

name: PPG Hi-Temp 1027
description: Single-component silicone high temperature coating for surfaces operating up to 1027°F (553°C). Used on stacks, boilers, furnaces, and high-temperature process equipment requiring oxidation and corrosion protection at extreme temperatures.

name: PPG Hi-Temp 500
description: Silicone-alkyd high temperature coating for service up to 500°F (260°C). Provides corrosion protection and colour retention on piping, tanks, and equipment at elevated operating temperatures. Air dry or force cure.

name: Amercoat 738 Antifouling
description: Self-polishing copolymer antifouling coating for ship hulls and submerged marine structures. Provides controlled biocide release to prevent fouling organism attachment and reduces hull friction drag for fuel savings.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Flat
description: PPG's premium interior flat paint with zero VOC and exceptional hide. Self-priming formula with advanced stain resistance and washability for the most demanding residential and commercial interior applications.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Eggshell
description: PPG's premium interior eggshell with zero VOC and superior washability. Provides a smooth low-sheen finish with excellent colour richness and resistance to scrubbing for walls in living areas and bedrooms.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Satin
description: PPG's premium interior satin with zero VOC and outstanding washability for kitchen and bath surfaces. Provides a smooth, lightly sheen finish with superior stain resistance and durability for high-traffic areas.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Semi-Gloss
description: PPG's premium semi-gloss interior paint with zero VOC for trim, doors, and accent walls. Highly washable and scrubbable finish with outstanding stain resistance and moisture resistance for kitchens and bathrooms.

name: PPG TIMELESS Interior
description: Self-priming premium interior paint with zero VOC and outstanding hide that covers in one coat in most situations. Advanced formula provides excellent washability, stain resistance, and colour consistency across all sheen levels.

name: PPG TIMELESS Exterior
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with outstanding UV resistance, colour retention, and durability. Self-priming formula with excellent hide for wood, hardboard, stucco, and masonry. Resists fading, mildew, and weathering.

name: PPG BREAK-THROUGH Waterborne Alkyd
description: Waterborne alkyd for doors, trim, and cabinets providing the hard durable finish of oil-based paint with the easy cleanup of latex. Excellent levelling eliminates brush marks for a smooth factory-like finish. Low VOC with fast recoat.

name: PPG SEAL GRIP Primer
description: Interior and exterior bonding primer that adheres to glossy and difficult surfaces including tile, glass, PVC, and painted metal without sanding. Excellent stain blocking and adhesion for problem substrates.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Pro EV Zero VOC
description: Professional contractor interior zero VOC paint with excellent hide, coverage, and fast dry time. Designed for high-production painting in commercial and residential projects. Minimal odour makes it suitable for occupied spaces.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Interior
description: Reliable contractor-grade interior acrylic latex providing excellent coverage and hide for production painting. A trusted staple for residential and commercial painting contractors balancing performance and economy.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Exterior
description: Contractor-grade 100% acrylic exterior latex providing reliable weather resistance, hide, and adhesion. A production-focused exterior paint for residential and light commercial projects at a contractor price point.

name: PPG Manor Hall Exterior
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with outstanding UV resistance, flexibility, and hide. Provides long-lasting protection for wood, stucco, fibre cement, and masonry siding. Excellent adhesion and mildew resistance.

name: PPG Sun-Proof Exterior
description: 100% acrylic exterior paint formulated for superior UV resistance and colour retention. Excellent flexibility, adhesion, and mildew resistance for wood, hardboard, and stucco in all climate conditions.

name: Pitt-Tech Plus DTM Industrial
description: Direct-to-metal industrial acrylic coating functioning as both primer and topcoat for ferrous and non-ferrous metals. Excellent rust inhibition, adhesion, and durability for maintenance painting of structural steel and equipment.

name: Pitt-Tech One Pack DTM
description: One-component DTM industrial coating with the performance of a two-component system. Rust inhibitive formula for steel and iron in light to moderate industrial environments. Fast drying for quick return to service.

name: Amerlock 400 Epoxy Floor
description: Two-component epoxy floor coating for concrete in warehouses, manufacturing plants, and commercial facilities. Provides excellent adhesion, abrasion resistance, and chemical resistance with a durable easy-to-clean finish.

name: PPG Floor Coat Epoxy
description: Two-component 100% solids epoxy floor system for concrete providing excellent abrasion and chemical resistance. High-gloss decorative finish with outstanding durability for retail, commercial, and light industrial floors.

name: Pitthane Ultra Urethane Floor
description: Waterborne aliphatic polyurethane floor finish for concrete and wood floors requiring a decorative durable surface. Excellent abrasion resistance, UV stability, and chemical resistance for commercial and institutional floors.
